parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id AS application_id,
  a.role_title,
  a.status,
  a.match_score,
  a.created_at,
  a.submitted_at,
  a.responded_at,
  c.name AS company_name,
  coalesce(c.synthesis->>'company_type', 'unknown') AS company_type,
  (
    SELECT ar.output_json->>'tier'
    FROM agent_run ar
    WHERE ar.application_id = a.id AND ar.agent_name = 'match_scorer'
    ORDER BY ar.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS match_tier
FROM application a
LEFT JOIN company c ON a.company_id = c.id
WHERE a.created_at >= now() - interval '28 days'
ORDER BY a.created_at ASC

INSERT INTO weekly_insight (week_start, insights)
VALUES ($1::date, $2::jsonb)
RETURNING id
